claim_bullets.bullet_text: The recipes are written for practicality and may introduce JavaScript features such as methods and prototypes (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.79-93)
Each recipe fits within the spirit of the language discussed so far, even if some implementations use advanced features (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.79-93)
The partial application recipes bind a leftmost or rightmost argument, demonstrating closures and context‑aware partials (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.79-93)
The chapter includes code examples such as `callFirst`, `callLast`, and `greet` (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.79-93)
The chapter focuses on functions that return functions, covering partial application and other practical recipes (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.79-93)

source_record_text: Recipes with basic functions, a chapter that covers partial application, a unary ..
